paragraphs.text: Two simple tiers built for product teams that ship constantly. Cancel anytime. Volume discounts at 25+ seats.
For small product squads getting their first changelogs out the door.
For product orgs running parallel releases, customer comms, and a brand voice to protect.
Enterprise plans add dedicated infra, custom data residency (EU, US, APAC), private model fine-tuning on your historical release notes, and a named CSM. Talk to us about volume pricing past 25 seats.
The AI writing copilot that turns messy Notion docs and Jira tickets into polished release notes in seconds.

visibleText: Luminos Hero Features How it works Pricing Early Access Start Free Trial Pricing Pay for polish, not per word. Two simple tiers built for product teams that ship constantly. Cancel anytime. Volume discounts at 25+ seats. Monthly Annual SAVE 20% Crew For small product squads getting their first changelogs out the door. $ 29 /seat/ month Billed monthly Billed annually — $276/seat/year Start with Crew ✓ Auto-draft release notes from up to 50 Jira tickets / month ✓ Notion & Linear two-way sync ✓ 3 tone presets (Casual, Formal, Hype) ✓ One-click Markdown & HTML export ✓ 5 saved templates per workspace ✓ Email & community support ★ Most Popular Studio For product orgs running parallel releases, customer comms, and a brand voice to protect. $ 79 /seat/ month Billed monthly Billed annually — $756/seat/year Get Studio ✓ Unlimited Jira, Notion, GitHub & Confluence sources ✓ Custom tone calibration sliders + brand voice memory ✓ One-click publish to Confluence, Intercom & Mailchimp ✓ Customer email generation with merge fields ✓ SSO/SAML, audit logs & role-based access ✓ Priority Slack support with 2-hour SLA Need something bigger? Enterprise plans add dedicated infra, custom data residency (EU, US, APAC), private model fine-tuning on your historical release notes, and a named CSM. Talk to us about volume pricing past 25 seats.
